## Description
Provide a clear description of the changes you are proposing and why they are necessary.

## Type of Change
Please mark the options that apply:
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Code improvement (refactoring, optimization)
- [ ] Documentation update (e.g. updates to README, CONTRIBUTING)
- [ ] New blacklist source/feed suggestion

## Checklist
Before submitting this Pull Request, please ensure:
- [ ] My code/rules follow the coding standards of this project.
- [ ] I have verified that all scripts compile correctly with no syntax/runtime errors.
- [ ] I have not committed any private tokens, passwords, or emails.
- [ ] If adding a blacklist source, it has been verified for high uptime and low false-positive rates.
- [ ] I have read the [CODE_OF_CONDUCT](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md) and [CONTRIBUTING](CONTRIBUTING.md) guidelines.
